name: ColorSelection
summary: This class provides methods to show the color palette for drawing colors and hatch background colors.

methods.name: ShowColorPalette
methods.signature: public static TeklaDrawingColor ShowColorPalette(TeklaDrawingColor color, IntPtr? hWndOwner = null)
methods.summary: Shows the color palette for drawing colors.

params.name: hWndOwner
params.doc: (Optional) The window handle of the owner window. If not provided, uses the main window handle of the current process.

methods.name: ShowColorPaletteForHatchBackground
methods.signature: public static TeklaDrawingColor ShowColorPaletteForHatchBackground(TeklaDrawingColor color, IntPtr? hWndOwner = null)
methods.summary: Shows the color palette for hatch background colors.

params.name: hWndOwner
params.doc: (Optional) The window handle of the owner window. If not provided, uses the main window handle of the current process.
